title: SILVERHOOK shlk3 10w/40 Engine Oil, Blue Label, 5 L
features: Semi synthetic for advanced petrol and diesel engines
Good engine protection during cold starting
description: Silverhook 10W/40 semi-synthetic petrol/diesel SL/CH-4 is a super multi-grade engine oil which "Excel" At high & low temperature extremities providing the highest level of protection even while cold starting. Excel is based on the very latest developments in additive technology & formulated with a balance blend of full synthetic base stocks & first quality solvent refined mineral oils producing a high performance engine oil with the enhanced properties of semi-synthetic technology. Excel has the high API SL/CH-4 specification suitable for conventional, multi - Valve & Turbo charged petrol engines and Turbo Diesel engines.
